seoTitle: Illinbah vs Image Flat — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Illinbah and Image Flat. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Illinbah vs Image Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Illinbah and Image Flat.
heading: Illinbah vs Image Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Illinbah, Queensland and Image Flat, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Image Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Illinbah (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Illinbah or Image Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Illinbah has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Image Flat scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Illinbah scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Image Flat scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Illinbah or Image Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Image Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
